counters.description: could be focused in laning phase as easy target unless you polymorph them with good timing if focused.
main focus in laning phase as you'd be a squishy target over the adc.
can be quite annoying to play against as her root has a big hit box as well as her black shield to protect her.
has more aa range than lulu so you can be poked out from lane.
can be slowed/rooted in lane and targeted by adc.
outranged and poked before getting close to xerath.
careful not to stand too close to her plants incase she roots and lulu range is not close enough to do any harass back.
